title: blockram inference on ECP5 results in large amount of supporting logic

features.name: ecp5 dual_port ram 256x16
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM inferred from a reg array with exactly 256 entries of 16 bits, matching the DP16KD resource on ECP5

features.name: ram read_as_write in write always block
features.description: Code should include a RAM read operation where the result is assigned to a register inside the same always block that contains the conditional RAM write logic

features.name: write enable single bit slice select
features.description: Code should include a write enable condition that extracts a single bit using bit-indexing on a multi-bit signal, where the bit index is itself a constant

features.name: ram dual_port with separate read write addresses
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM where write address comes from a bit-slice of one signal and read address comes from a different input signal
